title: Week 14 restore runbook and drill design
acceptanceTarget: Design and execute a non-production restore drill that proves database, volume, encryption key, and Compose/env/proxy config can restore n8n to a usable state.

restoreSteps.expectedResult: All files in the backup set pass checksum verification.

restoreSteps.command: docker volume create "${RESTORE_PROJECT}_n8n_data"; docker volume create "${RESTORE_PROJECT}_caddy_data"; docker volume create "${RESTORE_PROJECT}_caddy_config"; docker volume create "${RESTORE_PROJECT}_postgres_data"
restoreSteps.expectedResult: Fresh isolated volumes exist for the drill.

restoreSteps.command: docker run --rm -v "${RESTORE_PROJECT}_caddy_data":/target -v "${PWD}/${BACKUP_DIR}":/backup:ro alpine:3.20 sh -c 'cd /target && tar -xzf /backup/caddy_data.tgz'; docker run --rm -v "${RESTORE_PROJECT}_caddy_config":/target -v "${PWD}/${BACKUP_DIR}":/backup:ro alpine:3.20 sh -c 'cd /target && tar -xzf /backup/caddy_config.tgz'
restoreSteps.expectedResult: Caddy state volumes are restored for proxy parity.
PostgreSQL starts in the isolated project.

restoreSteps.command: docker compose -p "${RESTORE_PROJECT}" --env-file "${BACKUP_DIR}/.env" -f "${BACKUP_DIR}/compose.yaml" exec -T postgres sh -c "dropdb -U \"${POSTGRES_USER}\" --if-exists \"${POSTGRES_DB}\" && createdb -U \"${POSTGRES_USER}\" \"${POSTGRES_DB}\""
restoreSteps.expectedResult: The restore database is empty and ready.
n8n starts with the restored database, restored volume, and same N8N_ENCRYPTION_KEY.
Logs have no encryption key, migration, permission, or database fatal errors.

acceptanceChecks: The isolated restore project does not use production container names or production DNS.
Checksum validation passes before any restore command runs.
n8n starts using the same N8N_ENCRYPTION_KEY that was saved during backup.
Workflows, credentials, users, and settings are visible after login.
Existing credentials do not show decryption failures.
WEBHOOK_URL, N8N_EDITOR_BASE_URL, N8N_PROXY_HOPS, and Caddy reverse proxy config match the saved Compose/env/proxy config.
Filesystem binary data can be sampled when the deployment uses filesystem binary data mode.
Measured restore duration and RTO evidence are recorded.

failureDiagnosis.symptom: n8n starts but credentials fail to decrypt
failureDiagnosis.firstCheck: Verify N8N_ENCRYPTION_KEY matches the key used when the database backup was created.
Verify POSTGRES_DB, POSTGRES_USER, schema, compose project, and pg_restore target database.

failureDiagnosis.symptom: webhook URL points to localhost or an old domain
failureDiagnosis.firstCheck: Verify WEBHOOK_URL, N8N_EDITOR_BASE_URL, N8N_PROXY_HOPS, and Caddyfile from the backup set.
Verify the active binary data mode and restore the corresponding filesystem, database, or S3 data.

failureDiagnosis.symptom: proxy TLS behavior differs from production
failureDiagnosis.firstCheck: Verify Caddyfile, caddy_data, caddy_config, DNS, and TLS state.
